questions.question: A software development project manager uses a historical data-based approach to estimate the effort required for a new project. Which of the following is a benefit of this approach?
questions.hint: Consider the advantages and disadvantages of each approach

questions.question: A software engineer estimates the effort required for a project using an analogy-based approach. When estimating the effort required for a similar project, what is a potential drawback of this approach?
questions.hint: Consider the limitations of analogy-based estimation

questions.question: A software project manager uses a parametric modeling approach to estimate the effort required for a new project. What is a key assumption made by this approach?
questions.hint: Understand the assumptions underlying different estimation techniques
